tooltip.customweapons.flame_blade:
On hit: Ignites the target.
Right-click: Unleash a fiery nova (16s cooldown).
tooltip.customweapons.frost_edge:
On hit: Slows the target.
Right-click: Unleash a freezing nova (18s cooldown).
tooltip.customweapons.thunder_hammer:
On hit: 20% chance to call lightning.
Right-click: Strike lightning at your target (30s cooldown).
tooltip.customweapons.vampire_dagger:
On hit: Heals you for 0.75 hearts.
On kill: Grants Speed II and Regeneration.
